home.dropTitle: Drop images or PDFs to start recognition
home.dropDescription: Supports png, jpg, jpeg, webp, and pdf. Multiple files are queued automatically.
home.cloudDisclosure: Files are uploaded to Baidu Cloud for recognition.
home.postCreateRefreshFailed: Tasks were created, but the list could not be refreshed. Check the Task Queue.
home.dropRegistrationFailed: File drops could not be monitored.
home.serviceHelp: Select an official cloud model for the task
home.loadFailed: Recent tasks could not be loaded.
home.empty: No tasks yet. Choose or drop files to get started.

vl16.description: Multimodal parsing for complex documents with structured Markdown output.
vl16.fit: Papers, scanned books, complex layouts, and handwriting

ppOcrV6.description: Fast scene-text recognition with broad language support.
ppOcrV6.fit: Screenshots, photos, street scenes, and identity documents

structureV3.description: Preserves layout structure and precise coordinates for structured extraction.
structureV3.fit: Table extraction, searchable PDFs, and layout reconstruction

queue.loadFailed: The task queue could not be loaded.
queue.actionFailed: The action failed. Please try again.
queue.persistenceNote: Tasks are kept on this device and resume after restart.

viewer.pdfPreview: PDF rendering is available in enhanced preview mode
viewer.noSelection: Select a completed task from Home or the Task Queue.
viewer.noResult: This task does not have a result yet.
viewer.loadFailed: The recognition result could not be loaded.
viewer.exportFailed: The export failed. Please try again.

auth.message: Your token is invalid or has expired.
auth.suggestion: Update the AI Studio token in Settings.

quota.message: Today's quota has been used up.
quota.suggestion: Switch to another model or wait for tomorrow's reset.

rate_limited.message: The service is receiving too many requests.
rate_limited.suggestion: PaddleDesk will retry with backoff, or you can try again later.

invalid_input.message: The file or recognition options are not accepted by the service.
invalid_input.suggestion: Check the file type, size, and page count, then submit it again.

network.suggestion: Check your network or proxy settings, then retry.

parse.message: The recognition result could not be parsed.
parse.suggestion: Check for updates and report the issue if it continues.

unknown.suggestion: An unknown error occurred. Review the technical details and try again.

runtime.clipboardImageUnavailable: No image is available on the clipboard.
runtime.captureFailed: Screen capture could not be started.

welcome.title: Welcome to PaddleDesk
welcome.subtitle: Complete two quick steps to start accurate document recognition.
welcome.cloudDisclosure: Images and documents are uploaded to Baidu Cloud for recognition. PaddleDesk makes this explicit.
welcome.tokenStorage: Your access token stays in Windows Credential Manager. It is never written to files, the database, or frontend storage.

token.title: Connect PaddleOCR
token.subtitle: Get a free AI Studio access token and validate it immediately.
token.step1: Open the official PaddleOCR task page and sign in to Baidu AI Studio.
token.step2: Follow the page instructions to create or copy an access token.
token.step3: Paste it below. Once validated, recognition is ready to use.
token.invalid: That token is not valid. Copy it again and retry.
token.failed: The action failed. Check your connection and try again.

update.title: PaddleDesk {{version}} is available
update.bodyFallback: This release includes improvements and fixes.
update.failed: The update could not be installed. Please try again later.

history.searchPlaceholder: Search recognized text or file names

settings.saveFailed: The setting could not be saved. Please try again.

account.title: AI Studio account
account.cloudDisclosure: Documents are uploaded to Baidu Cloud for recognition. Your token is stored only in Windows Credential Manager.
account.failed: The token could not be validated. Check your connection and try again.

privacy.title: Privacy and network
privacy.privacyHint: When enabled, only page counts are kept; results and searchable history are not stored locally.
